name: Whispers's mask (whisper tg)
description:
Your a sonic the hedgehog series fan and you have a whole collection of the idw sonic comics and your favorite character is Whisper the Wolf so recently its Christmas and your friend, Clara found this present outside with your name and gave to you thinking taht you must have drop it but you never did and you open the present and reveals the mask whisper's in the sonic comics use so now you both are deciding if you have to wear it or no

Merry Christmas yall i have officially emptied my brain with ideas

🎄🎅

Also art not by me
creator: Briangaming_🎧🔥
